title: Verify browser UAT probe against local instance — runbook / scripts integration test workflow
description: Document and validate the browser UAT probe workflow: agent launches local Categorizer, opens browser MCP to http://localhost:3001/, collects console errors and GET /api/reviews response. Document expected outcomes: JSON success or structured error (no JSON SyntaxError on HTML per AC-5). Reference BUG-0002 for HTML 404 risk context. Add as runbook section or integration test documentation.
notes: Agent probe workflow: (a) start_command, (b) poll health_url until HTTP 200 / 60s cap, (c) browser_navigate to browser_probe_url, (d) collect console errors via CDP/Runtime.evaluate, (e) fetch /api/reviews body, (f) stop_command. Per AC-5: must not throw JSON SyntaxError on HTML response.
